short_summary: Iran deal, Tren de Aragua, Anthropic
rationale: Iran deal remains the dominant story for US residents via potential war/peace implications and oil prices; Tren de Aragua airstrike is a continuation of established policy; Anthropic AI suspension continues as federal policy background.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: Trump says Sunday signing, Tehran disputes timing
top_events.summary: Conflicting signals on Iran deal signing keep Americans uncertain about whether a major war is ending or continuing — direct implications for US military posture and oil prices.

top_events.title: US kills Tren de Aragua gang leader in airstrike
top_events.summary: Trump confirms US airstrike killed the leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang — continuation of established counter-gang airstrike policy, modest domestic security signal.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends new AI tools over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: Federal security-driven suspension of Anthropic AI tools continues as active policy, affecting US tech sector and AI development landscape.
